Aruba.budget_proxy_basis: Regional proxy: Dutch Caribbean, Netherlands COL as reference

Gabon.budget_proxy_basis: Regional proxy: Central Africa, oil economy

Japon.budget_override_reason: Tourist prices (hotels Tokyo/Kyoto) significantly exceed local COL. Numbeo city-level Tokyo=73.

Laos.budget_proxy_basis: Regional proxy: Southeast Asia low-income (Cambodia 34, Vietnam 26)

Maldives.budget_override_reason: Resort-only destination. No Numbeo data. Tourist cost systematically level 5.

Monaco.budget_proxy_basis: Regional proxy: France COL × 1.4 — ultra-premium enclave

Nouvelle-Calédonie.budget_override_reason: Proxy France but high local costs. Tourist cost level 5.

Palaos.budget_proxy_basis: Regional proxy: Pacific island, no Numbeo data

Polynésie française.budget_override_reason: Proxy France but very high local costs + long-haul flights. Tourist cost level 5.

Portugal.budget_override_reason: Borderline 2/3 (COL=48.8). Algarve/Lisbon comparable to Spain but slightly more affordable.

Qatar.budget_override_reason: Numbeo reflects expat local cost. Tourist hotels (Doha) are level 4.

Émirats Arabes Unis.budget_override_reason: Numbeo reflects expat local cost. Dubai/Abu Dhabi tourist hotels are level 4.

Émirats arabes unis.budget_override_reason: Numbeo reflects expat local cost. Dubai/Abu Dhabi tourist hotels are level 4.
